reviews.review_msg: Prof. Punja is one of the best profs I have had so far. His exams are all based on what he teaches. The lectures are all easy to understand and require no book reading. I would definitely take his class again!!

Hardest course ever! Great prof, keeps you interested. Talks fast. Throws in a couple jokes once in a while. He even wrote the class poems to keep our heads up for exams. Really kind and thoughtful. He has the most amazing simplified notes which gave me a reason to go to class!

The course overall is not that hard but her grade scale is so weird. 10% tutorial quiz and 10% midterm. Idk how the midterm portion is same as the quiz portion and the midterm is much harder than the quizzes. And we have another midterm worth 15% and one lab exam one final. Basically we are preparing exam and quiz every week. So much pressure.
